title: Anyhall 2-Pack Rat Traps Humane Live Mouse Cage Traps (Silver)
features: 31.5 x 14.5 x 11.5 CM live cage trap, humane way to catch and relocate rats, mice and chipmunks
Larger trigger pedal than similar traps on the market, much more sensitive to be triggered
Once the pedal is triggered, the door will be closed instantly and the auto door lock will prevent animals from escaping
Easy to use and clean, reusable for indoors and outdoors
Not applicable to big squirrels and opossums, since they have great power to chew through the wire or break the trigger mechanism inside
description: ANYHALL LIVE ANIMAL CAGE TRAPS (31.5 x 14.5 x 11.5 CM) - Suitable for rats, mice, chipmunks, voles and other similar-size animals. - Catch the nuisance animals alive and relocate them far away from your home. FEATURES - High sensitive design, once the animal trips the trigger, the door will close instantly. - Slide bar door lock design, auto latch the door once the pedal is triggered. - One more plate than the similar traps on the market, making it very convenient to use. NOTICE - To avoid any injuries caused, we suggest you wear safety gloves when releasing the animals. - Cover the cage with a cloth to reassure the trapped animals during transportation. Release the animal at least 3km away. - Be sure to check your local catch-and-release laws before trapping. - Any problems, just feel free to contact us. If you lose the user manual, email us for the electronic version.
